title: DataTorch Action Schema
description: Schema for authoring DataTorch actions (action-datatorch.yaml). This schema is authoring guidance for editors: it is stricter than the agent runtime, which ignores unknown keys.

$schema.description: Optional reference to this schema for editor tooling.

name.description: The name of your action. DataTorch displays the name when the action is ran.

author.description: The name of the action's author.

cache.description: Enable caching of results keyed on the action's inputs. A pipeline step's cache setting overrides this.

inputs.description: Input parameters allow you to specify data that the action expects to use during runtime.

^[_a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*$.description: A string identifier to associate with the input.

description.description: A string description of the input parameter.

deprecationMessage.description: A string shown to users using deprecated inputs.

required.description: A boolean to indicate whether the action requires the input parameter. Set to true when the parameter is required.

default.description: The default value is used when an input parameter isn't specified in a workflow file.

multiline.description: String inputs only: render as a multi-line text area in forms.

options.description: String inputs only: restrict the value to this list (rendered as a select in forms; membership enforced server-side).

outputs.description: Output parameters allow you to specify the data that subsequent actions can use later in the workflow after the action that defines these outputs has run.

^[_a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*$.description: A string identifier to associate with the output.

description.description: A string description of the output parameter.

multiline.description: String outputs only: render as a multi-line text area in human task forms.

options.description: String outputs only: restrict the value to this list (rendered as a select in human task forms; membership enforced at submission).

env.description: Environment variables the action reads from the agent's environment (e.g. API keys). Declare names and descriptions only — NEVER values. Values are provided by the agent's environment; declaring them here documents the requirement and feeds the pipeline requirements manifest.

description.description: Why/when the action needs this variable (e.g. 'Needed when provider is anthropic').

runs.description: Describes how to execute the action.

using.description: The application to use to execute the code specified in main.

command.description: Required for 'cmd': Command to execute. Read step inputs from $INPUT_<NAME> environment variables — interpolating ${{ input.* }} into a command raises InputInjectionError.

main.description: Required for 'python' and 'node': The code file that contains your action code.

image.description: Required for 'docker': The Docker image to use as the container to run the action.

examples.name: Echo Input
examples.author: DataTorch Developers
examples.description: Prints input from the command line.

EXAMPLE_API_KEY.description: Example of declaring a required environment variable. Never put values here.
